description: Small flat, dry, constant-base-state warm-bubble convergence case for M6 Tier-3 infrastructure. This is independent of d02 replay and uses the ADR-023 unified acoustic path only as the current operator under test.

case_choice_rationale.why_not_d02: The sprint requires an idealized case independent of Gen2/d02 replay so timestep sensitivity is not mixed with boundary replay or configuration noise.
case_choice_rationale.why_flat_warm_bubble: The contract validation command names flat_warm_bubble_tier3. To avoid reusing the old amplitude gate, this case uses a small cosine-bell theta perturbation, short integration, and convergence norms instead of a target w-amplitude band.
case_choice_rationale.wrf_inspiration: <DATA_ROOT>/canairy_meteo/artifacts/wrf_gpu_src/WRF/test/em_hill2d_x/namelist.input exists and documents an ideal dycore-only, open-x/periodic-y, no-physics test family. This case is flatter and smaller for infrastructure smoke only.

base_state.hydrostatic_balance: analytic isothermal base pressure and geopotential

boundary_conditions.x: open edge-gradient in current ADR-023 pressure-gradient implementation
boundary_conditions.y: open edge-gradient in current ADR-023 pressure-gradient implementation
